name: uacp
description: Unified AI Context Protocol — schema validator and test harness

scripts.test: node test/version-consistency.js && node --test test/resource-limits.test.js && node --test test/sync-event.test.js && node --test test/identity-chain.test.js && node --test test/event-payload.test.js && node --test test/vector-clock.test.js && node --test test/scope-identifier.test.js && node --test test/member-set.test.js && node --test test/promotion-event.test.js && node --test test/withdraw-event.test.js && node --test test/audit-event.test.js && node --test tools/uacp-validate/__tests__/*.test.js && node validate.js && node conformance/harness/run.js
